name: Smoked Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak wood chips (Mesquite or Hickory) in enough water to cover for about an hour before cooking.
2. Drain the chips before use.
3. In a covered grill, place SLOW coals on both sides of the drip pan.
4. Sprinkle some dampened wood chips over the coals.
5. Place the ribs, bone side down, on the grill and replace the cover.
6. Cook the ribs until done, about 1 1/2-2 hours, adding more wood chips every half hour.
7. Meanwhile, in a saucepan, mix tomato soup, wine, onion, cooking oil, mustard, chili powder, paprika, celery seed, and salt (1/4 tsp).
8. Heat the sauce on the side of the grill.
9. Brush the ribs with the sauce.
10. Grill uncovered for about 20 more minutes, brushing the ribs frequently with sauce.
